programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law is pinned by Fujitora, and Doflamingo has the upper hand! Only the most cunning of tricks could save Law's plan to hand Caesar over to Nami & the others! Meanwhile, the Sunny falls into danger again, & the battle for Block D heats up in the Colosseum.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law must put himself in harm's way to defend the Sunny and the Straw Hats from Doflamingo's all-out assault! With barely enough time to save the crew, plans change and send the Sunny on a new mission -- but will it be able to get underway?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law & Doflamingo are embroiled in a heated showdown which triggers Momonosuke's memories of Doflamingo's cruelty from the first time they met; meanwhile, after a tearful fanboy conversation Zoro finally gets to see Luffy but all eyes are fixed on Rebecca.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bartolomeo searches the Colosseum for Luffy but stumbles upon the medical center for the losers of the battles in the ring, but is everything at this center as it seems? Meanwhile, Rebecca has to fend off Rolling Logan's vicious bone-crushing grip attack.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The losers of the Colosseum battle who are being held below the infirmary have a surprising person in their midst! But do they have a clue as to their terrifying fate? Meanwhile, the Tontatta Kingdom's history is made clear.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bartolomeo finally finds Luffy and starts to lead him to Zoro, while the toy soldier begins to tell the heart-breaking story of how Doflamingo cheated the Riku dynasty out of their control of Dressrosa!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the toy soldier's story continues, the sad fate of King Riku and his army, and his daughter Princess Viola, is revealed as well as how the people of Dressrosa fell into the hands of Doflamingo. And all the toys in the country share a mysterious secret.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Kin'emon, and Luffy are reunited again, but little do they know that their reunion is being monitored by a potential threat! Meanwhile, the battle rages on between Doflamingo and Law as these two powerhouses clash.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Kin'emon make a mad dash to save Law but Navy Admiral Fujitora stands in their way, bringing his full power against them. The Navy is in hot pursuit as a ship approaches with unexpected visitors from the past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After revealing the horrible history of Dressrosa, Toy Soldier now shares their plan to liberate the Tontatta Kingdom and bring down the Doflamingo Family, Operation SOP. Luffy bumps into a heavily-wounded Bellamy and Bartolomeo

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp and Robin make their way via an underground tunnel dug by the tiny people of the Tontatta Tribe - a tunnel so small in fact, that Franky couldn't fit! Instead, Franky makes his way to the Toy House.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the contenders for the battle of Block D dwindle to only thirty, Rebecca has her hands full with the menacing Suleiman the Beheader! All hope seems lost that she can take him down and move on to the finals!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle for Block D comes to a shocking end and the winner that emerges from the cloud of dust stuns the audience even more! Meanwhile, Luffy, Zoro, Kin'emon, and Wicka of the Tontatta Tribe are about to reach the lift to the palace.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Viola, aka Violet, once a great princess of the Dressrosa family, shows Luffy & the others a secret entrance into the palace which avoids the use of the heavily-guarded lift. In the palace's Suit Chamber, Navy Admiral Fujitora reveals his plans.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The final round at the Corrida Colosseum finally begins, as Diamante joins the combatants in an all-out struggle to win the Flare-Flare Fruit! As the stakes escalate, can one champion beat the others & snatch the fruit from the Colosseum's newest hazard?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his group continue their ascent towards Doflamingo's inner sanctum, but standing in their way is an executive of the family whose power is so strong moving past him seems impossible! Meanwhile, Cavendish learns the dark secrets of Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Operation SOP finally gets underway but as Leo makes the dash to hide the Tatabasco grape in Sugar's fruit basket, Robin calls for an emergency stop to the plan! Meanwhile, Luffy, Violet, and Zoro are stalled by Pica whose sheer size overwhelms them.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Operation SOP is underway and nearing its final stage! But Trebol proves a far stronger guard for Sugar than was expected, so Robin hatches a plan to lure him away. But is there enough time to execute the plan before the ruse is discovered?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas are devastated by Trebol's furious attack, but as Usopp tries to convince Leo to abort the operation, Leo tells him about their commander Toy Soldier's stunning true identity! The Toy Soldier finally shakes off Lao G and gets moving again!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro continues his deadly duel with the nearly indestructible Pica! While the Toy Soldier narrowly escapes Lao G only to come face to face with Gladius! Luffy continues his mad dash to the top of the palace to face Doflamingo!

programme.title: Quantum of Solace
programme.desc: On a non-stop quest for justice that crisscrosses the globe, Bond (Daniel Craig) uncovers an intricate conspiracy by the mysterious Quantum organization to take control of one of the world's most important natural resources! Judi Dench also stars.

programme.title: Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig is back as James Bond and his loyalty to MI6 leader M (Judi Dench) is tested as her past returns to haunt her. 007 must track down and destroy the threat, no matter how personal the cost. Javier Bardem and Ralph Fiennes also star.

programme.title: No Time To Die
programme.desc: A mission to rescue a kidnapped scientist turns out to be far more treacherous than expected, leading Bond (Daniel Craig) onto the trail of a mysterious villain armed with dangerous new technology.

programme.title: The Living Daylights
programme.desc: This thrilling, lightning-paced adventure has the indestructible James Bond (Timothy Dalton), armed with his razor-sharp instincts and license to kill, battling diabolical arms merchants and chasing the gorgeous Maryam d'Abo.

programme.title: Licence to Kill
programme.desc: James Bond catapults into his most passionate adventure -- not for country, not for justice, but for personal revenge. Timothy Dalton brings urgency, charm and deadly determination to his role as 007.

programme.title: Octopussy
programme.desc: Desde una emocionante persecución en jet hasta una cuenta regresiva de un desastre nuclear, James Bond vuelve en una electrizante aventura que nos lleva al límite del estremecimiento con emoción incesante.

programme.title: 007 Quantum
programme.desc: En una búsqueda incansable de justicia que atraviesa el mundo, Bond (Daniel Craig) descubre una compleja conspiración de la misteriosa organización Quantum para tomar el control de uno de los recursos naturales más importantes del planeta.

programme.title: El mañana nunca muere
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan regresa como el valiente, astuto y devastadoramente encantador agente 007 en esta trepidante aventura.

programme.title: Su nombre es peligro
programme.desc: Equipado con agudos instintos y una licencia para matar, James Bond enfrenta a mercaderes de armas diabólicos decididos a dominar el mundo en esta emocionante y tumultuosa aventura.

programme.title: Licencia para matar
programme.desc: James Bond se lanza en su aventura más apasionada -- no por su país, no por la justicia, sino por venganza personal. Timothy Dalton aporta urgencia, encanto y determinación mortal en su papel como el agente 007.

programme.title: GoldenEye: el regreso del agente 007
programme.desc: James Bond vuelve con una nueva y emocionante aventura, repleta de acciones impresionantes, escenarios lujosos, bellezas femeninas y vehículos potentes. Sin embargo, esta vez se enfrenta a un adversario particularmente peligroso.

programme.title: Life On Fire

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Windows to Other Worlds
programme.desc: As technology has advanced, we have been able to peer into distant reaches of space. From the first telescopes to high-tech satellites, these machines have been our windows to other worlds.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fountain of Creation
programme.desc: Without the Sun's warmth and light, life as we know it would not exist. It is the powerhouse of our planet and provides the energy we need to survive.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Rocky Shores
programme.desc: The arid shores of other planets tell the stories of their past. What did they look like, and could they have ever supported life?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Silent Partner
programme.desc: Although we have put man on the moon, our silent partner still holds many mysteries. What haven't we seen? What haven't we discovered?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Borderland
programme.desc: Deserts and dunes, cliffs and canyons. Although Mars is certainly an alien wasteland, it is a planet with terrestrial formations remarkably similar to those found on Earth.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Mars: Red Dawn
programme.desc: Landing a spacecraft on Mars is no easy task given our limited knowledge of the planet. The difference between success and failure can rely on the most minute detail.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Giant Planets: Lords of Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity is one of the most basic and powerful forces shaping our universe. Discover its nature within our own solar system, from the smallest moons to the largest planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Outer Limits: Edge of the Solar System
programme.desc: For centuries, it was was thought that Saturn was the most distant planet in our Solar System. With the evolution of the telescope, we discovered the rest of our planets, both elusive and mysterious.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hidden Havens: Icy Moons
programme.desc: There are hundreds of moons in our solar system. Could one of them be a hidden haven that harbors alien life forms?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Icy Gems: Frozen Moons
programme.desc: In the far depths of space, out of reach of the Sun's warmth, water can only exist in a super solid state. Some small moons, in fact, are made entirely of ice. What stories do these Icy Gems have to tell about our solar system?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Shooting Gallery: Asteroids and Comets
programme.desc: Scientist long thought that our solar system consisted of the sun, the planets, and their moons. We soon found that we are far from alone, often coming into contact with asteroids, comets, and other debris.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Galactic Visions: Alien Worlds
programme.desc: The diversity, complexity, and downright beauty of our own solar system is astounding. Could such beauty exist in other parts of the universe as well? Thanks to modern science, we now have the capability to see for ourselves.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: Discover the most powerful telescopes on the planet as they search for the mysteries of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire
programme.desc: The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it's also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: They key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Bianca, a woman from the future, arrives to take Chris' powers, and Leo learns that she is actually part of an assassin family of witches.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Paige finds herself transported back in time to an era of free love and free magic, where she discovers Grams, a peace-loving hippie, who is on a crusade to rid the world of evil through the magical power of love.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: An eerie, mud-covered ghost transports Melinda from her house to an exotic jungle, but the ghost is unfortunately limited in speech due to a horrible condition, making it hard for Melinda to understand how she can help him.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When Melinda has a hard time talking to the newest ghost in her life, she soon learns that the reason why he visited her is because he is in a coma.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: A ghost who can recall his previous lives appears to be destined for another reincarnation as the child of Melinda's pregnant friend---but the spirit doesn't want to return and actively seeks to harm the unborn baby.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When her Jeep breaks down on a deserted road, Melinda gets involved with a mystery when a spirit who looks like a skeleton gives her a warning to stay away.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Following a career-week presentation at Grandview High, Melinda sees the spirit of a cheerleader attack her former squad-mates.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Piper vanquishes a demon from Wyatt's room, she has an epiphany about the rest of her life concerning Wyatt. Unable to handle Piper's revelation, Paige and Phoebe decide to remind Piper of the importance of love by conjuring up a 'Mr. Right.'

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Jason breaks up with Phoebe when he finally learns her and her sisters are really witches. Meanwhile, Richard attempts to free himself of his family's karma, and Piper and Paige try to vanquish a group of Swarm demons.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Charmed Ones help out Leo's mentor, Gideon, when he wants to find out who cast the spell of darkness over a magic school and conjured the Headless Horseman who has been beheading the teachers.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When Phoebe frees a genie from a bottle, she soon finds that she must take the genie's place. Meanwhile, anxious to put Leo and Piper back together, Chris uses Phoebe to make his wish come true, but she takes his instructions too literally.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Gideon makes a deal with the Darklighters to get rid of Leo, but they accidentally send Leo and Piper to the Ghostly plane, leaving Phoebe and Paige to believe that they are both dead.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison's visions become a vital source of information to the authorities after samples of a deadly disease disappear. Meanwhile, Scanlon thinks he's ready to ask Lynn to marry him.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: The prime suspect in a serial killer case dies, and the police are convinced he's the guilty party. When the dead suspect contacts Allison, he tells her that he's innocent and agrees to help her find the real killer.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: It’s every castaway for themselves, as two tribes become one in this season’s merge. Meanwhile, one castaway’s thirst for power could earn them a spot on the jury, and jaws drop as the blindside streak continues.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: The entire tribe embarks on the craziest idol hunt in the history of the game. Also, one castaway showcases their ninja-like skills to sabotage another.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: One castaway’s paranoia could lead to a game-changing flip, and a grade-school memory challenge looks more like a college exam for several exhausted castaways.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: Homesick castaways are granted a brief reprieve with letters from home. Meanwhile, one castaway secretly embarks on a stakeout to gather intel from the competition and another castaway falls hard while attempting to collect coconuts from the treetops.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: One castaway’s bidding strategy at the Survivor auction could pay off for them. Meanwhile, castaways draw rocks for a huge advantage in the game, and another castaway decides to show off his idol in an attempt to ensure his safety.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: During an intense challenge, castaways attempt to crack the code and earn a spot in the final five. Additionally, one castaway’s paranoia threatens another’s stake in the game, and Tony’s closest confidant is wooed by another alliance.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: Castaways scale new heights as they battle for a guaranteed spot in the final four. Meanwhile, friends become enemies when one castaway overhears plans for her eviction, and Tony comes up with a strategy for his special Immunity idol

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: Eyeing a spot in the final three, one castaway pulls one of the greatest comebacks in Survivor history, and the final castaways face a bitter jury when pleading their case for the $1 million prize.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: The Castaways are reunited for the first time to discuss their behaviors and motivations.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: The "Blood vs. Water" theme returns as all-new castaways compete with - and ultimately against - their loved ones who share the same goal: to outwit, outplay, outlast and ultimately be crowned Sole Survivor and winner of the 1 million dollar prize.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: After losing their flint, one tribe attempts to barter with Jeff in a rare negotiation. Meanwhile, former MLB player John Rocker's controversial past threatens his future in the game.

programme.title: Survivor

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Lockhart & Gardner's future is at stake when a couple whose divorce was overseen by the firm accuses them of encouraging the breakup for financial gain.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia defends a lawyer who hires the firm after the government arrests him for not revealing the name of an anonymous client: a mysterious computer programmer who illegally invented a new online currency.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: With her investigation complete, Special Prosecutor Wendy Scott-Carr presents her evidence against Will to the grand jury in hopes of sending him to prison for bribery. Meanwhile, Eli and Stacie Hall square off once again. Carrie Preston returns as Elsbet

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: In this episode, Lockhart & Gardner leads a class action suit against a software company that allowed the Syrian government to "disappear" American citizens.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: While power grabs are being made at the firm, Alicia and Caitlin square off against old foe Nancy Crozier. Meanwhile, Peter discovers the price of taking the moral high road. Mamie Gummer returns as Nancy Crozier and Democratic political strategist Donna

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia must once again aid Colin Sweeney when a sexual misconduct claim derails his attempt to win back control of his company. Also, Cary is faced with a moral dilemma when Peter tasks him with enforcing office policies. Bebe Neuwirth and Morena Baccarin

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia once again faces Louis Canning in court, but recent financial concerns lead her to reconsider his standing job offer. Meanwhile, Diane reconnects with the enigmatic Jack Copeland. Michael J. Fox, Bryan Brown and Gary Cole guest star.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: When Alicia is assigned to be on a blue ribbon panel investigating a police shooting, she begins to question the motivations behind the chairman's actions. Meanwhile, Kalinda receives unwanted attention from the IRS. Matthew Perry guest stars as Mike Kres

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: As Alicia counsels a client whether to accept a strict plea deal, she's distracted by Peter's newest political rival, whose actions force her back into the public spotlight. Matthew Perry returns as Mike Kresteva and Parker Posey returns as Vanessa Gold.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia defends a judge against misconduct charges stemming from his days as a prosecutor. Meanwhile, Cary makes a career decision and Kalinda deals with the repercussions of Agent Delaney's investigation.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Will and Diane scramble when Louis Canning and Patti Nyholm team up to bankrupt the firm. Also, Alicia faces conflicted feelings regarding her relationship with Peter, and Kalinda's past catches up to her. Michael J. Fox returns as Louis Canning and Marth

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: One year after the final episode of "The Good Wife," an enormous financial scam has destroyed the reputation of lawyer Maia Rindell, while wiping out her mentor and godmother Diane Lockhart's savings. Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Diane raises eyebrows while settling in as a new partner at Reddick, Boseman & Kolstad. Maia continues to deal with the repercussions of her family's Ponzi scheme. Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Adrian and Barbara face a cruel realization about a high-profile client. While second chair to Diane, Lucca is in for more than she bargained for thanks to the state's attorney's office's golden boy. Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he discovers what it’s like to work in the wild thanks to six of the wildest guides ever. African Elephants, Hippos, Guanacos, Gorillas, Wildebeest, Zebra, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to Akagera National Park in Rwanda, once devastated by poaching, to see its transformation and thriving populations of Hippos and Crocodiles and a homecoming for African Crowned Cranes.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Living Fossils
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets some of the most ancient species living on Earth. Red pandas, hoatzins, koalas, crocodiles and pelicans!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he honors the hard-working moms of all species, like Brown Bears, Chimpanzees, Elephants, Nyala Antelope, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: In the wild, animals use their noses to find food, water and even mates! Today, Jungle Jack counts down the animal kingdom’s superior sniffers - from grizzly bears and sharks, to dogs and rhinos – find out which notable nose is the most powerful!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and Sue as they head to the southern tip of Chile to explore the untamed region of Patagonia! The land beneath the towering Andes Mountains is home to Condors, Guanacos, and some of the most beautiful Glaciers in the world.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack and Suzi as they meet some mighty meerkats living in California's desert, and visit a wolf sanctuary dedicated to saving the misunderstood species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Hoof It
programme.desc: Giraffes, zebras, moose and bongo have very different coats, but they all wear the same shoe style. We’re talking about hoofs, of course! Join Jungle Jack as he counts down today’s featured creatures, all the way to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's comin' home to the Columbus Zoo in Ohio where he gives his grandkids a behind-the-scenes tour. Join in as they learn the ins and outs of zookeeping while meeting amazing animals like elephants, a clouded leopard, and a baby koala.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack travels to the awe-inspiring Galapagos Islands where he visits a pristine island booming with bio-diversity called Fernandina, home to a huge colony of Marine Iguanas, along with Sea Lions, Sally Lightfoot Crabs, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In 1990, Mary Bradford of Kannapolis, North Carolina took one parrot into her house in need of care, now her commitment has grown to more than 275 birds. Mary's unique care center is believed to be the only retirement home of its kind for exotic birds.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Zootastic Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jack for a globetrotting adventure as he counts down seven zoo-tastic adventures from the Australia Zoo to his home base, the Columbus Zoo! See which zoo is number one on this Wild Countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack discovers the incredible dedication of caregivers in the hills of Tennessee's Smoky Mountains. Baby Birds, Raccoons, Possums and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack travels to exotic Singapore for an adventure filled with some of the most fascinating creatures in the world.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Find out the answers to some of nature’s biggest mysteries! Why do gorillas spend so much time in trees, why do male lions have such shaggy manes, why do jellyfish live upside down? You’ve got questions, and Jungle Jack has the answers!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with the ultimate Jack-of-all-trades as he immerses himself in exciting and sometimes dirty jobs caring for animals. A vet's assistant caring for Rhinos, a Bat researcher in South America, working with a King Cobra in Malaysia, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Help Wanted
programme.desc: There’s no job too big or small for Jungle Jack as he gets to work as a horse farrier, baboon crossing guard, beekeeper and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: On Vancouver Island, in British Columbia, Jack and his daughter Kathaleen experience Canada from above and below the water.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: On the Caribbean Island of Dominica, Jack climbs up Morne Diablotin in search of the Sisserou, the world's most endangered parrot. Jack also encounters a large Boa Constrictor, then tries to keep pace with a “mountain” chicken.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's epic adventure to the Serengeti unfolds with a once-in-a-lifetime look at the great migration of wildebeest and zebra. Then Jack encounters elephants, lions, and an African rock python and he pays a visit to a local school.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack accompanies four Florida manatees on a long distance flight from Sea World, Orlando to the Columbus Zoo in Ohio.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack boards a submarine heading deep into the waters of Curacao, uncovering everything from lionfish to newly discovered species. Then Jack and the team from the Columbus Zoo work to rehabilitate coral reefs by planting baby coral in the ocean.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack on a whale-watching safari to Catalina Island where he meets a Humpback Whale, Fin Whale, loads of Dolphins, California Sea Lions, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wickedly Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along if you dare as Jungle Jack is counting down hair-raising true stories from the sea, land and air! Face-to-face encounters with bats, caiman, snakes, plus real dragons, on this Wickedly Wild Countdown.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack uncovers creatures that are experts at blending into their surroundings, like Cheetahs, Okapi, Leopards, Wagler's Pit Vipers, Geckos, and African Painted Dogs!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Tree for Me
programme.desc: The sky’s the limit on today’s countdown. Tigers, orangutans, leopards, monkeys and more! Find out which high-flying animal is number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack, Suzi, and Kathaleen as they immerse themselves with Phinda's rangers who are protecting the reserve's precious population of rhinos and lions!

programme.desc: A stagecoach driver seeks the Lone Ranger's help when her assistant is framed for a robbery.

programme.desc: Tonto and the Lone Ranger are puzzled by an old friend's disappearance.

programme.desc: A man runs a "town" as a place of refuge for men fleeing from the law.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Love, adventure and romantic hijinks are afloat when The Love Boat sails to the beautiful Eternal City of Rome and the sites of glorious Capri and Venice in a special two-hour premiere.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A mindreader meets a man and uses the reading to improve her chances at getting his attention. Meanwhile, Capt. Stubing's friend brags about his son's accomplishments, but Vicki hears a totally different story.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy is torn between his biological father, who he hasn't seen since he was a baby, and the stepfather who raised him. Meanwhile, Elaine tries to tell her parents that her fiance is a paraplegic.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A woman's (Greer Garson) ability to see the future may hinder her relationship with an attractive man. Plus, a single mother thinks she meets a divorced man traveling with his daughter, but that's not exactly the case.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Angelorum Dominicus suddenly appears aboard the Pacific Princess without a reservation and soon begins to spread love and happiness to everyone on the cruise, especially a little boy in need of an operation.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A female producer is adamant about not wanting to start a relationship with an actor, but the thespian has other plans. Meanwhile, a therapist goes on a cruise with his group, while Doc and his nephew compete for the affection of the same woman.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When Gopher suspects a skipper under Capt. Stubing's tutelage is trying to take his job, the crew jumps into action to protect their boss. Meanwhile, a lovely lady causes havoc when she boards with two men who are each after her hand.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A woman's (Joan Rivers) shyness around men is exacerbated by her recent mastectomy that is until she meets an understanding man. Meanwhile, when a married couple contemplates divorce, it's their son, who's also a lawyer, that gets caught in the middle.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When an elderly man's granddaughter falls for one of his fresh-faced friends, the man seeks out some of the youth potion for himself. Meanwhile, things start moving a little too fast for Isaac and the woman he's dating.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A sarcastic woman (Anne Meara) goes on a rampage when she finds out she's on a cruise with the same man she's suing (Jerry Stiller) for damages. Meanwhile, a famous professor meets a former student who is hired to replace his mentor/

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When Stubing meets a gorgeous movie queen (Joan Collins), who recently shed her ninth husband, he is fascinated by her charm and beauty. Then, a man decides to prioritize golf over his wife, so the neglected woman decides to play ball with an old friend.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The captain's daughter is put in a tough situation she is accused of stealing supplements from Doc's office. Then, Gopher's uncle (Red Button) falls in love with the lady who runs the ship's gift shop.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The vivacious Hannah Harvye (Mary Martin) immediately becomes involved with the crew and rekindles a romance with an old flame. An unassuming man (Ben Murphy) finds himself in a tight situation with a maid he's never met. Gopher saves a man's life.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Christmas Cruise
programme.desc: Doc marries a younger woman only to run into his ex-wife while on his honeymoon. Meanwhile, a voluptuous diet doctor hires a svelte fitness instructor to impersonate her, and a man has to tell his partner their relationship may be over.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: “To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth”.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental “brain fingerprinting” technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For serial killers, once is never enough. For investigators, the challenge is steep when the killers murder by numbers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a “black box.”

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder, at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their undoing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas McCain's, a traveling photographer, comes to North Fork plying his trade. When a murder is committed, the photographer is accused of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark manages to capture a hawk but falls into danger with a rattlesnake. A stranger comes to his rescue and Mark invites the man home, unaware that he is on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas takes in an orphaned teen being raised by his abusive uncle after there is trouble at the school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor Abel MacDonald, but they decide he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When his employer begins to suspect him of embezzlement, bookkeeper Asa Manning decides to hire a professional gunman to take care of the problem.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A drought has forced local cowhands to seek work on a railroad construction project, but executives are afraid workers will desert them if they believe an old man's claim of making rain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshall Torrance's odd behavior towards him. Soon, men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds of the body of a murder victim, Lucas, his friend Artemus and Marshall Torrance begin a search for the killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When renegade Apaches wound Lucas and kidnap Mark, Marshall Torrance joins with U.S. Marshall Sam Buckhart to form a rescue posse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is the town's representative to the railroad commission until an infamous train robber dies and leaves his ill-gotten wealth to Lucas. Lucas must clear his name.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a rancher dies after the bank forecloses the mortgage on his property, his son blames the banker for his father's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a wealthy rancher is killed, Mark suggests that they seek the aid of a mind reader to identify the murderer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A group of outlaws devise a plan to get rid of Lucas so that they can take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas kills a mountain man in a brawl, his father arrives in North Fork to break his other boys out of jail and take revenge on Lucas and Marshall Torrance.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Newly arrived gunslinger Al Walker throws a mammoth party at the saloon, keeping acting Marshall Ben Waller busy until Lucas is forced to intervene.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The remaining members of the group try to keep it together in Alexandria; they receive a sobering visit.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Saddled with grief and surrounded by enemies, members of the group try to find safety at the Hilltop before it's too late.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Someone stumbles upon a brand new society unlike anything seen before.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A deeper look at the Sanctuary and the world of the Saviors; members of Alexandria look for supplies.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan's unwelcome visit to Alexandria continues as other members scavenge for supplies; things quickly spin out of control.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the others are led to a new community, where they meet the residents and their ruler; a familiar face resurfaces.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: While searching for a missing Alexandrian, Rick and his group encounter a mysterious collective, its inhabitants unlike any they have come across.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: An Alexandrian discovers they must navigate the mysterious, confusing and terrifying world within the Saviors' compound.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group scavenges for supplies; back in Alexandria, someone must make a morally challenging decision.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Things do not go as planned when a group of Kingdommers delivers goods to the Saviors during a routine supply drop-off.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Saviors visit the Hilltop unexpectedly, surprising everyone, with plans of taking more than supplies.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A group of Alexandrians embarks on a journey; one member of the group must make a heartbreaking decision.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The stakes continue to grow higher as paths cross; the group enacts an intricate plan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and his group, along with the Kingdom and Hilltop, have banded together to bring the fight to Negan and the Saviors.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y el grupo enfrentan desafíos que ponen en riesgo su vida mientras intentan que su nuevo hogar sea un lugar seguro. ¿Valdrá realmente la pena esa nueva utopía?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo descubre, poco a poco, que la vida en su refugio empieza a replicar las adversidades que enfrentaron afuera. ¿Podrá Rick soportarlo?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl está en peligro, mientras Rick y el grupo continúan sintiendo que no pertenecen a Alexandria, donde los problemas comienzan a filtrarse.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Primera vez de nuevo (S6 Ep1)
programme.desc: Rick y el grupo aún tienen problemas para adaptarse en Alexandria. ¿Podrá una nueva amenaza unirlos o separarlos aún más?

programme.title: The Walking Dead: JSS (S6 Ep2)
programme.desc: Justo cuando parece que las cosas pueden retornar a la normalidad, o tan normal como se pueda en el apocalipsis, un nuevo problema aparece para los habitantes de Alexandria.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Gracias (S6 Ep3)
programme.desc: Un regreso a casa no resulta como lo esperado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: El de aquí no es de aquí (S6 Ep4)
programme.desc: Se introducen una cara nueva y un nuevo lugar. Con todo lo sucedido en el apocalipsis, ¿puedes confiar en la gente?

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Ahora (S6 Ep5)
programme.desc: Hay problemas dentro y fuera del portón.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Siempre responsable (S6 Ep6)
programme.desc: Regresar a Alexandria resulta difícil.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Advertencia (S6 Ep7)
programme.desc: Las cosas en Alexandria están tranquilas, brevemente.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: De principio a fin (S6 Ep8)
programme.desc: Varios problemas se encuentran entre si.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Sin salida (S6 Ep9)
programme.desc: Con "caminantes" dentro de Alexandria, Rick y el grupo están asustados, en desventaja y las cosas solo se ponen más difíciles.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: El mundo por venir (S6 Ep10)
programme.desc: Una misión de recolección sencilla se vuelve complicada cuando el grupo entiende que no son los únicos que quieren un enorme depósito de materiales.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Nudos para desatar (S6 Ep11)
programme.desc: Cuando Rick se da cuenta de que Alexandria no es tan segura como pensaba, se deben tomar decisiones sobre un nuevo rumbo.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A tall, powerfully built girl, Kitten Twitty, registers at a hotel and secret agent James T. West carries her trunk to her room, not knowing it contains his archenemy—diminutive, giggling Dr. Loveless.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon find the town of Willow Springs looted and its citizens completely immobile -- victims of a mysterious paralysis.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent, James T. West, investigating the murder of a fellow agent, discovers a plot to assassinate the President of Mexico.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A self-styled maharajah kidnaps secret agent James T. West and holds him captive in his palace.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon again face Dr. Loveless whom, planning to rule a world of "little people," reduces West to a six-inch miniature.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A mad woman scientist creates a bomb-carrying robot identical to agent Westand orders it to kill members of the President's cabinet.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon employ the services of a man who possesses a power of concentration that controls animals.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agent West gets involved in a bizarre extortion scheme involving green "Venusians" who claim they need gold for spaceship fuel.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon visit a town named Justice during Law and Order Seek and find it the site for a convention of criminals.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon are assigned to free a fellow agent from Devil's Island.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent West is kidnapped by a madman who plans to create an underwater kingdom that will control the world's shipping lanes.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The evil, diminutive Dr. Loveless impoverishes an Indian tribe so that he can become their benefactor -- and their god.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon fail to save the life of a highly unpopular Latin American dictator they have been assigned to guard.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agent Gordon has a vivid nightmare about a prisoner's mother's ghost who attempts to clear the name of her son, imprisoned 35 years.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Custom foam forms and the "cat face" plaster technique replicate existing detail in the house. Norm visits cabinetmaker Larry Buckland. The existing roof on the main house will have to be replaced.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Alfonso shows Kevin the last two steps of the stucco system. We see the house’s new period-appropriate ornamental ironwork. The reproduction tile for our project is hand-glazed and goes up inside.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The 1930s floors are matched with red oak and walnut. The new back terrace, with corbels and tile, is constructed. We see attractive low water plants. Kevin gets a close look at the Hollywood sign.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kitchen cabinets, soapstone countertops, an archway, and a coved ceiling are installed. Richard helps with a pedestal sink. The Juliette balcony and decorative iron balustrade are installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A new custom garage door blends with the period of the house. The front gates are installed. Kevin shows the front yard, hardware, and light fixtures, then visits a spectacular Spanish style house.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Work on the Los Angeles project wraps up with the finishing touches both outside and in. We reveal the space and landscaping. The family congratulates everyone on a job well done.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: TOH TV heads to Bedford, MA, to check out their new project: a colonial-era home. The Homeowners plan to preserve the historic part of the house while adding space and amenities with two additions.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger transplants shrubs and plants from the front. Kevin and Norm remove the front entry porch and clapboards. Tom shows the layout for the new addition. Roger sets up a drain and sump pump system.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Mark open up a hole in the old fieldstone foundation. Historic sashes are taken off for rehab. Richard sees the oldest flag in the country. Tom forms the new addition’s foundation out of ICFs.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin finds the walls of the entry addition framed up. Tom creates the connection to the main house. Mark repairs the chimney and the kitchen fireplace gets removed. Norm revisits the Acton Project.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Jenn Nawada shows the landscape plan. Roger removes invasive vines and brambles. Tom raises a new gable wall. Kevin repairs a historic window sill. Norm and Kevin demo the ceiling.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin explains the benefits of using OSB sheathing. Tom removes a cast iron pipe obstructing structural beams. Norm sees our historic window sash repaired. Tom takes down the old wall of the ell.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom adds insulation to the oldest part of the house. Roger gets a lesson in building a cook's garden. Jenn and Roger build raised beds out of old fieldstone. Tom waterproofs the new roof.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom replaces a rotted post. Restored historic window sashes are installed. The garage's electrical service is upgraded. Kevin shows the kitchen's inspiration. Tom removes reveals historic boards.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom installs new red cedar clapboards. Richard helps remove some old kitchen plumbing. Roger installs a new asphalt driveway. Richard shows how he's solving a rough plumbing problem.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm and Tom create a historically accurate front door. The ailing American Beech tree gets saved. Kevin shows an antique home. Interior designers share the direction for the new space.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger installs a granite front step and spreads ryegrass on the lawn. Tom installs new wood windows. Norm visits the Colonel James Barrett house. Richard seals and insulates the old ductwork.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Norm install decorative timbers. Richard shows A/C condensers' concrete mounting pad. Norm visits the Parson Capen House in MA. Tom uses a new hidden deck fastening system.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger creates a winding brick path. Fitting a modern kitchen into an old house. Richard shows a zero-clearance gas fireplace. Norm makes wainscoting out of old boards. White oak floorboards go down.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom restores the c. 1720 front door and makes "barn" doors for the pantry. Richard shows a new zone damper system. Mark installs a hearth using reclaimed bricks.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger lays the driveway finish. Custom wall coverings and ironwork are installed. Tom shows the new garage door. Richard shows the latest water heaters. We see family room and kitchen lighting plans.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger and Jenn install plant material. Backsplash tile, wallpaper, and metalwork are installed. We see the finished kitchen and design choices. The wrap party begins.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The crew opens the Barrington, RI, project. The challenge will be building to withstand the marine environment. Norm sees a classic home recently built. Andy's crew starts gutting the first floor.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin finds the new foundation in place and framing underway. Kevin meets the Exec. Director of the Coastal Resources Management Council to see the lengths people will go to live by the water in RI.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm shows installing windows with a custom copper pan for flashing. Kevin visits the Hurricane Research Lab at the U of Florida. At the end of the day, it is time for the clambake down on the beach.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Andy uses red cedar shingles between the first and second floors. Richard shows a hydronic HVAC system integrated with solar hot water and electricity. Norm shows Newport's famous mansions.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A sustainable landscape is created with native plants. Metalsmiths install a custom copper gutter. Ross shows an off-the-grid bed and breakfast lighthouse. Richard sees our solar hot water system.

programme.desc: Bob builds a Darksaber without a plan, using basic materials.

programme.title: Bob Clagett: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Bob and his friend Josh build a secret office space accessed through a corner wardrobe.

programme.title: Bob Clagett: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Bob transforms a cabinet space into a pullout pantry and builds an egress closet space.

programme.title: Bob Clagett: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Bob builds a lean-to greenhouse and a robust porch swing.

programme.title: Bob Clagett: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: After much thought and planning, Bob builds a vintage arcade for modern electronics.

programme.title: Laura Kampf: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Experimenting with discarded materials, Laura makes some unconventional storage options.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack believes he has won a baking contest that is open only to women. Disguised as "Grandma Tripper," he goes to collect the check and learns that he is a finalist and must bake his cookies for the company's executives to win the prize.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's father visits unexpectedly and resumes his good nature meddling. Jack explodes and tells him to stay out of his life, but when he learns his father has lost his job, Jack gives him the opportunity to be useful.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri is up for a promotion and tells Dr. Kenderson she is married to ward off his advances. When he invites himself and his wife over for dinner, Jack poses as Terri's husband while Janet and Larry pose as French-speaking house guests.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack attends a charity ball with a socialite and loses $15,000 gambling, Larry and the girls attempt to help him recover the money.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls flip over a handsome Englishman who moves in next door, but Jack and Furley become convinced that he is one of London's most sought after criminals.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet is thrilled with her new job as an aerobics teacher, and her new boss Tina is thrilled with Jack. When Tina blackmails Jack into being at her beck and call, Larry offers to take her off Jack's hands.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an old flame at the park who is seeking advice about her jealous husband. Furley joins them, and they all get poison oak. Later, at Jack's house, Furley tells the husband they were all in the bushes together.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Furley get locked in a freezer together. Convinced they are going to die, they have a heart-to-heart talk, and Jack confesses that he really isn't gay. Once safe, Jack worries because Furley knows the truth about him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The trio plants a stray cat at Furley's door, hoping he'll bend his rules and keep it. When a girl appears looking for her kitten, Furley lies and says he took it to the pound; so Jack and the girls search the pounds and bring home three different cats.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: After a night on the town with his old navy buddies, Jack discovers he has a tattoo on his derriere. When Jack goes to the hospital to have it removed, Janet thinks he is having a vasectomy and Furley thinks he is having a sex change.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack offers to model for a beautiful art teacher and finds himself nude in front of her classroom when Furley walks in. Jack begs Furley not to tell, but the secret is out when a nude portrait of Jack appears at the Regal Beagle.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack borrows Janet's new car to drive a gorgeous model to a photo session and totals the car on the way home. He pretends to have amnesia in the hospital, but Janet gets suspicious and concocts a plan to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A customer of the flower shop names Janet in his will, and she receives a vase. His nephew, Philip, an art collector, visits Janet, and Jack thinks he lied about the value of the vase and is trying to get it back.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an attractive stewardess, Vicky Bradford; but between her father and her dates, she doesn't seem to have time for Jack. Janet announces her engagement to Philip, while Jack is jealous and lovesick.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack thinks Vicky wants a job in Houston and encourages her, causing her to think he wants to end their relationship. She interrupts Janet's wedding to find out why. They make up and the ceremony resumes. Jack proposes and is stunned by Vicky's refusal.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Vicky explains that she is afraid of marriage and suggests to Jack that they live together. Jack reluctantly agrees. They are toasting their first night together in their new apartment when they are interrupted by Mr. Bradford.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: In order to convince their landlord, Mr. Roper, that there is nothing going on between them and their new male roommate, Chrissy and Janet tell him that Jack is gay.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy's visiting mother, not knowing that the girls have rented the spare room to Jack, causes havoc when she decides to spend the night with them.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Roper feels convinced that his niece will be safe going out with Jack, and Jack would rather be with Janet and Chrissy celebrating Janet's birthday, until he sees the niece.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's fast-talking friend, Larry, gives Jack and the girls a puppy and the kids go to all lengths keeping this from Roper who forbids animals in his building.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has guilt feelings about not standing up to the tough guy who makes a play for Chrissy at the local pub and goes back the next night to tell the Casanova off.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Panic reigns in the apartment when Mr. Roper takes the rent money without leaving the girls and Jack a receipt, making them think their place was robbed.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Chrissy walk in while Janet is entertaining a date, fostering a new rule on privacy.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack, realizing he can't meet his obligations to pay his share of the rent, gets a part-time modeling job only to find out that he's expected to pose nude. Guest Star(s): Sally Kirkland

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Chrissy apparently do Janet a disfavor by talking her into trying for a promotion at the florist shop where she works.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Chrissy and Janet go away for the weekend, Jack throws a wild party and Stanley Roper gets the morning-after blues.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy falls for an older man she meets at the supermarket. Jack is jealous, but he's even more upset when Mr. Roper tells Jack and Janet that she knows the man's wife. Guest Star(s): Dick Sargeant

programme.title: Luis Alberto Lopez vs Gabe Flores
programme.desc: On September 10th, 2021, Luis Alberto Lopez fought Gabe Flores in a super featherweight bout in Tucson. In a surprising upset, Lopez won by a convincing unanimous decision.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Julio Cesar Chavez 1
programme.desc: On June 7th, 1996 Oscar De La Hoya and Julio Cesar Chavez fought for the first time for WBC World super Lightweight titles at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that ended by technical knockout in the fourth round giving the win to De La Hoya.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Luis Ramon Campas
programme.desc: On May 3rd, 2003 Oscar De La Hoya faced Luis Ramon Campas for WBA and WBC World super welterweight title at the Mandalay Bay Resort in Las Vegas the ended by technical knockout in the 7th round with De La Hoya securing the victory.

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs John Mugabi
programme.desc: On March 10th, 1986 Marvin Hagler and John Mugabi fought at the Caesars Palace Outdoor Arena in Las Vegas for IBF, WBA and WBC world middleweight titles while Mugabi was ranked number 1 by all three bodies the fight ended in a victory for Hagler.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Pernell Whitaker
programme.desc: On April 12th, 1997, Oscar De La Hoya fought Pernell Whitaker for the WBC Welterweight Title at Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. De La Hoya won by a very controversial decision in a fight that many thought Whitaker had the superior performance.

programme.title: Michael Carbajal vs Humberto Gonzalez 1
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1993, Michael Carbajal fought Humberto Gonzalez for the WBC and IBF Light Flyweight Titles in Las Vegas. After being knocked down twice earlier in the fight, Carbajal made an incredible comeback, knocking out Gonzalez in the 7th round.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Rafael Ruelas
programme.desc: On May 6th, 1995 Oscar De La Hoya fought Rafael Ruelas for IBF and WBO World Lightweight titles at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas. The 12 round bout only went two rounds ending in technical knockout favoring De La Hoya.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Ayub Kalule
programme.desc: On June 25th, 1981 Sugar Ray Leonard faced Ayub Kalule for the WBA World Super Welterweight title at the Astrodome in Houston that ended by technical knockout in the ninth round giving Leonard the win.

programme.title: Montell Griffin vs James Toney 2
programme.desc: On December 6th, 1996 Montell Griffin and James Toney fought for a second time at the Lawlor Events Center in Reno for World Light Heavyweight titles resulting in an unanimous decision win for Griffin.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Ernie Terrell
programme.desc: On February 6th, 1967 Muhammad Ali fought Ernie Terrel at the Astrodome in Hourston, Tx. They fought for WBA and WBC World Heavyweight titles in a bout that went 15 rounds ending in a unanimous decision victory for Ali.

programme.title: Timothy Bradley Jr vs Kendall Holt
programme.desc: On April 4th, 2009, Timothy Bradley Jr fought Kendall Holt for the WBC and WBO Light Welterweight Titles at the Bell Centre in Montreal. Holt scored two knockdowns to keep the fight close, but Bradley stayed aggressive enough to earn the decision.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Oscar Natalio Bonavena
programme.desc: On December 7th, 1970 Muhammad Ali faced Oscar Natalio Bonavena in a 15 round bout with Bonavena going down three times in the last round forcing an automatic stoggage giving the win to Ali.

programme.title: Vasiliy Lomachenko vs Masayoshi Nakatani
programme.desc: On June 26th, 2021 Vasiliy Lomachenko fought Masayoshi Nakatani with Nakatani going down once in round 5 securing the win for Loma by technical knockout.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Floyd Patterson 2
programme.desc: On September 20th, 1972 Muhammad Ali faced Floyd Patterson for a second time at Madison Square Garden in New York that ended in the seventh round due to swelling and cuts on Pattersons eye giving the victory to Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs. Ken Norton 2
programme.desc: On September 10th, 1973 Muhammad Ali and Ken Norton participated in their second meeting at the Forum in Inglewood, CA. They fought for the North American Boxing Federation Heavyweight title with Ali winning this time with split decision.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Iran Barkley
programme.desc: On February 24th, 1989, Roberto Duran fought Iran Barkley for the WBC Middleweight Title in Atlantic City. Duran, known for his relentless aggression, defeated Barkley by a close split decision in what was named The Ring Fight of the Year for 1989.

programme.desc: The contempt for life exhibited by serial killers makes people question their own safety; psychopaths and sadists rarely show regret or empathy for the lives they destroy.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Scientists are involved in a never-ending quest to understand the vast universe the planet inhabits; it seems that for each answer science provides, even more questions arise.

programme.title: The UnXplained

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: A look at how some people live through the impossible such as plane crashes, freezing temperatures, or performing superhuman feats while in danger; remarkable tales of human survival force others to reconsider what is known about the will to live.

programme.desc: Throughout history, humans have buried their dead in caves or chambers, in pyramids or in some form of a tomb; ancient tombs were visual memorials for the dead; in China, a vast necropolis was constructed as a way to connect to the afterlife.
